description: Style Note You'll catch every passing eye with this beautiful bracelet from pitaraa. The subtle coil and spring design in white metal adds a sophisticated touch, while the gold colour provides an exquisite sheen. Wear it for that special day and get the mood just right with this piece! Product DetailsEight strands of gold colour beads in a coil and spring design, curved to form a bracelet and openings on both sides Material and Care White metal Polish with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirt Size Diameter of bracelet: 6 cm
